title: potentilla alpestris var. filiformis
intro: Potentilla alpestris var. filiformis, also known as Alpine Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. Alpine Cinquefoil is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Potentilla alpestris var. filiformis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
